source.title: BSEE Accident Investigation Report - Structural Damage / Slip Trip Fall

context.region: Gulf of Mexico - Keathley Canyon Block 875

event.top_event: Slip, Trip, Fall with Hand Injury
actions_taken: Worker transported to West Jefferson Hospital in Marrero, Louisiana
Surgery performed with plate and 8 screws implanted in right index finger
BSEE Lafayette District contacted on 26 April 2019
BSEE Inspectors mobilized on 14 May 2019 for incident investigation
G-110 Incident of Noncompliance issued to Anadarko Petroleum Corporation
event.summary: On 26 April 2019 at 03:55 hours, a Diamond Offshore Roustabout was injured on the Diamond Ocean Blackhornet drillship while rigging up a coil tubing unit. The worker tripped on a red air hose while carrying a 3-inch chiksan swing on his right shoulder. He fell to the rig floor and the chiksan swing struck his right hand, causing significant injury requiring surgery. The worker was evacuated for medical treatment.
key_phrases: Job Plan / Job Safety Analysis failure

hazards.name: Tripping hazard from air hose on rig floor
Crowded rig floor with multiple lines and hoses
Struck-by hazard from suspended or hand-carried equipment

threats.name: Worker trips on air hose while carrying equipment
Hand struck by chiksan swing during fall

controls.name: Impact resistant gloves
controls.barrier_role: Personal protective equipment to reduce hand injury severity
controls.lod_basis: PPE is a tertiary control after engineering and administrative controls

supporting_text: The DO Roustabout was wearing impact resistant gloves as he attempted to break his fall
his right hand had swelling isolated to the area around his right index finger

controls.name: Job Plan / Job Safety Analysis
controls.barrier_role: Administrative control to identify and mitigate slip, trip, fall hazards
controls.lod_basis: Administrative controls are primary prevention measures

supporting_text: the Job Plan / Job Safety Analysis failed to adequately address slip, trip, fall hazards associated with a crowded rig floor with lines and hoses associated with coil tubing and completion simultaneous operations

controls.name: Housekeeping and line/hose management on rig floor
controls.barrier_role: Engineering/administrative control to eliminate tripping hazards
controls.lod_basis: Elimination of hazards at source is primary prevention

supporting_text: his right foot hung up on a red air hose situated over a chiksan line
multiple lines and hoses that were situated on the rig floor were not perceived as a hazard by the DO rig floor crew

controls.name: Supervision of rig floor operations
controls.barrier_role: Administrative control to ensure safe work practices and hazard recognition
controls.lod_basis: Supervision is a secondary administrative control

supporting_text: Anadarko failed to provide adequate supervision when a DO Roustabout was injured when he tripped over an air hose

controls.name: Worker situational awareness and hazard recognition
controls.barrier_role: Administrative/behavioral control to prevent worker from encountering hazard
controls.lod_basis: Worker awareness is a secondary control dependent on human performance

supporting_text: the probable cause of the incident was due to the DO Roustabout's lack of situational awareness by not recognizing that the red air hose posed a slip, trip, fall hazard

notes.rules: JSON output only. mentioned fields must be evidence-based. Use null for unknown values.
